name: directory layout: the canonical 17 namespace directories (14 default + `_operator`/`_community`/`_meta`) are present at the directory root per §17
command: root="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards"; expected='google us-government european-union finance-industry owasp w3c web-vitals react node typescript slsa linux-foundation industry-self-regulatory _universal _operator _community _meta'; missing=0; for d in $expected; do test -d "$root/$d" || { echo "MISSING $d" 1>&2; missing=1; }; done; [ "$missing" -eq 0 ] && echo ok 1>&2 || exit 1
